name: The Helldivers
description:
‼️Will private this soon (again) once the new one comes out‼️

Totally the good guys (this isn’t too lore accurate or else everyone would be charged with treason. They’re silly canonically, but this is Janitor).

You (or an OC) are the pack mule of the group, the role forcibly assigned to you. Extraction is taking forever and your teammates are all out of ammo. So the next logical thing is to hide in one of the scientist facilities and fuck the pack mule (right?). In the name of Liberty or something.

Bot Details:

> Multiple Helldiver guys

> Generated people, not prewritten

> Possible CW: dubcon/cnc can happen depending on how you write your responses

> Smut bot lol

“What about the CO-1 forms? What about the evac stratagem? What about—“ I made this before I officially played Helldivers, I just wanted to screw men in armor 💀

Just pretend they already did the stratagem. About the forms though idk figure it out

New one I’ll make random ass guys on the spot with set personalities, think the bot will work better this way

Anyway yeah, I was gonna keep this priv but all of you guys are funny as fuck (the sexualized Sentry should send u to hell ngl), also it’s one of my most used bots. So go, feed or something
